raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX I made a purchase on XXXX for XXXX. The item was not as described seller provided return label to return the item for a refund. The charge was split between XXXX citi cards one charge for XXXX and the other XXXX XXXX has refunded the XXXX but not the XXXX. Merchant has accepted blame and has told me many times full refund issued but I never received the full amount. The merchant has already been paid by a claim with XXXX XXXX they did and citi card. I have sent all documents to citi such as a letter of explanation, receipts, invoices, emails stating refund, chats stating refund, XXXX XXXX letter stating they already paid the other party. The merchant has been paid twice. Citi is not helping they keep lying giving me excuses that case will be reopen but nothing happens. I was told by one agent at citi by the name of XXXX that they had made a mistake when they opened the dispute but that is not my fault. Please help with this matter.
